pi_items.source: Task description (task.json lines 5-6): 'Name: "Landline Extension"'. Verified in verifier.py line 36 which expects this exact name. Verified in export_result.sh line 21 which queries for name == 'Landline Extension'.

Task description (task.json lines 5-6): 'Description: "Internal telephone extension number"'. Verified in verifier.py line 37 which expects this exact description. Verified in export_result.sh line 36 which retrieves the description field.

Task description (task.json lines 5-6): 'Datatype: Free Text (or java.lang.String)'. Verified in verifier.py lines 77-78 which checks if datatype contains 'String' OR 'FreeText' OR 'java.lang.String'. The verifier accepts any of these keywords as valid datatypes. Metadata is slightly incomplete as it omits java.lang.String which is also accepted.

Task description (task.json lines 5-6): 'Min Occurs: 0'. Verified in verifier.py line 85 which checks str(details.get('min_occurs')) == '0'. Verified in export_result.sh line 39 which retrieves minOccurs field.

Task description (task.json lines 5-6): 'Max Occurs: 1'. Verified in verifier.py line 86 which checks str(details.get('max_occurs')) == '1'. Verified in export_result.sh line 40 which retrieves maxOccurs field.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Location Attribute Type named 'Landline Extension' in OpenMRS/Bahmni with description 'Internal telephone extension number', datatype Free Text (java.lang.String), min occurs 0, and max occurs 1. These are standard OpenMRS configuration properties for extending the location entity to track telephone extension numbers in healthcare information systems. All metadata values match the task specification exactly and are verified against both the task description and the verifier logic.
